topic: Add your phone number to your Instagram bio
caption:
Customers won't hunt for your number.
Put it in your Instagram bio right now.
Settings > Edit Profile > Bio. Done.
Small fix. Real calls.
We build websites that make it even easier. Link in bio.

#HighDesert #Victorville #Hesperia #AppleValley #SmallBusiness #SmallBusinessOwner #WebDesign #LocalSEO #VeteranOwned #InlandEmpire #ShopLocal #QuickWin
alt_text: Smartphone screen showing an Instagram profile bio with a local business name and phone number clearly visible in the text field.

copy.headline: Your Phone Number Belongs in Your Bio
copy.body: If someone finds you on Instagram and can't call you in two taps, you just lost them. Fix it in 10 minutes.
copy.caption:
Customers won't hunt for your number.
Put it in your Instagram bio right now.
